title: erucastrum baeticum
intro: Erucastrum baeticum, also known as Barbary cabbage, is a biennial plant in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Erucastrum baeticum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or capsule, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a food ingredient.
